vaultwarden                             │ service
  [LOW] Stack relies on the…            │ Service: vaultwarden
vaultwarden                             │ Fix: Review Required
  [HIGH] Vaultwarden domain …           │
vaultwarden                             │ Description:
                                        │ vaultwarden publishes 8080:80 on a
                                        │ publicly reachable host interface.
                                        │
                                        │ Why it's risky:
                                        │ Public bindings increase the attack
                                        │ surface. Services should bind to
                                        │ localhost when a reverse proxy handles
                                        │ external traffic.
                                        │
                                        │ How to fix:
                                        │ Bind the port to 127.0.0.1:
                                        │   ports:
                                        │     - "127.0.0.1:8080:80"
                                        │
                                        │ Evidence:
                                        │   port: 8080:80
                                        │
                                        ╰───────────────────────────────────────
   [1] Overview  [2] Findings  [3] History  [?] Help  [q] Quit
